versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   dell-container-storage-modules-1-9-0true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: dell
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: dell-container-storage-modules-1-9-0
      name: dell-container-storage-modules
      namespace: dell
      values: |
        container-storage-modules:
          cert-manager:
            enabled: true
